claims.subject: Constitutional Floors (F1–F13)
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate a sealed record that bypassed any constitutional floor.

claims.subject: /000 ↔ /999 Loop
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate that the loop is broken — that intelligence flows without root, or that records seal without constitution.

claims.subject: Immutable Memory
claims.reasoning: Intelligence without memory is pattern matching. Memory without immutability is narrative. Accountability across time requires records that cannot be rewritten. Without a vault, governance is performance.
claims.falsification_condition: Demonstrate a governed intelligence system that maintains accountability across time without immutable records.
